title: [HW/SV] Inner name ref to track field names
body:
Struct field names are sometimes invalid verilog names such as "begin", "end", "repeat", "vectored" and etc. 
These invalid field names will be renamed at ExportVerilog with https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/2359, but 
we may want to refer field names from verbatim ops. For example, GrandCentral creates verbatim ops
to access aggregate. But if their field names are invalid, we end up emitting invalid verilog. 
We can fix this by creating an inner name ref which refers the field name or field ID as suggested in https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/2398#discussion_r776002090
